metadata.name: Revicar
metadata.title: Revicar - Auto Repair | Carcavelos
metadata.description: Trusted auto repair in Carcavelos. Full-service mechanics, bodywork & paint, electrical, AC, and tyres for all brands.

hero.tagline: Full-service auto repair for all brands. Mechanics, bodywork, electrical, AC, and tyres — trusted by Carcavelos since 1985.

about.body:
Since 1985, Revicar has been the trusted mechanic of Carcavelos. For over 40 years, we've built our reputation on honest service, quality work, and treating every customer like family.

Our workshop handles everything from routine oil changes to complex engine repairs, bodywork restoration, and electrical diagnostics. We work with all brands, and our experienced team takes the time to explain what your car needs — no surprises, no unnecessary work.

items.title: Mechanics
items.description: Engine diagnostics, oil changes, brake repairs, suspension, timing belts — full mechanical service for all brands.

items.title: Bodywork & Paint
items.description: Dent repair, scratch removal, full repaints, and collision restoration — your car looking like new.

items.title: Electrical
items.description: Battery diagnostics, alternator repair, wiring issues, and electronic system troubleshooting.

items.title: AC & Climate
items.description: AC recharge, compressor repair, heating system service — stay comfortable year-round.

items.title: Tyres
items.description: Tyre fitting, balancing, alignment, and rotation. Quality tyres from trusted brands at fair prices.

items.title: Vehicle Inspection
items.description: Pre-inspection checks, preparation, and full vehicle inspections. We make sure your car passes with confidence.

images.alt: Car on the lift at Revicar
Bodywork and paint job in progress

items.quote: Honest and professional. I went to Norauto first because I have a card there, but once again they couldn't fix the problem. I called Revicar and they couldn't have been more professional and honest. They won a customer!
items.name: Pedro Fernandes

items.quote: Work of excellence, I recommend! The service is great and the work is very professional. Whenever I leave my car I'm very satisfied and trust 100% in the work done by Revicar — even in urgent situations they've always managed to help me.
items.name: Maria João Azinheira

items.quote: I came in with doubts and quite pessimistic about the mechanical problem with my car, but I left with the problem solved. I highly recommend them, especially for their competence, honesty and friendliness.
items.name: Pedro Carmo

items.quote: Very friendly — I had a problem that seemed difficult to fix and they solved it on the spot. We just moved to the neighbourhood and I'm already a customer!
items.name: Rafael Madureira

items.quote: Friendly, transparent and competent mechanics. I had a problem with my van and they fixed it in two and a half days. Would definitely go back!
items.name: Jannes T

items.quote: Excellent service with a very serious attitude. They've become THE trusted garage for all the cars in our household.
items.name: Júlio Martins

googleReviews.subtitle: Your review helps other drivers find a mechanic they can trust — and it means the world to our team.

items.question: Do you work with all car brands?
items.answer: Yes, we service all makes and models — from European brands like BMW, Mercedes, and Volkswagen to Asian brands like Toyota, Honda, and Hyundai.

items.question: Do I need an appointment?
items.answer: We recommend calling ahead so we can plan your visit, but walk-ins are welcome for quick services like tyre checks or battery diagnostics.

items.question: How long does a typical repair take?
items.answer: It depends on the service. An oil change takes about 30 minutes, brake work 1-2 hours, and more complex repairs we'll give you a clear timeline upfront.

items.question: Do you provide free estimates?
items.answer: Yes, we provide free, no-obligation quotes for all services. Call us or visit the workshop and we'll assess your car.

items.question: What are your payment options?
items.answer: We accept cash, debit/credit cards, and bank transfer. Payment is due when you pick up your vehicle.

items.question: Is there parking available?
items.answer: Yes, we have space for you to park when dropping off or picking up your car.

contact.body: Need a repair, a quote, or just some advice? Give us a call or drop by the workshop — we're always happy to help.

footer.tagline: Trusted auto repair for all brands in Carcavelos.
